data.title: [2fbd-f6b8] UPDATE: Update system-landscape.md plugin distribution boundary
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## What to do
Update docs/reference/system-landscape.md Plugin Distribution Boundary section:
- plugins/dso/ is local install path; host projects install at any path
- All plugin files use _PLUGIN_ROOT for portability
- Enforcement hook: zero tolerance, no suppression

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] system-landscape.md references _PLUGIN_ROOT
  Verify: grep -q "_PLUGIN_ROOT" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/docs/reference/system-landscape.md
